do: Run the aqueduct channel — tag the waypoint on the way
Enter Highgate at the far end
steps.layout: One straight canal — just follow the water.
steps.tip: ~Level 60 entering is on pace. Famous Humility/Tabula farm zone — don't farm it now.

do: Talk to Irasha, Petarus and Vanja, and Sin to flag the act's quests
Exit to The Descent
Head downhill to The Vastiri Desert
Find the Storm Blade chest (open ring of pillars) — beat the mummy waves and take the STORM BLADE
Tag the waypoint
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Ignore the sandstorm wall for now — it only opens with the Bottled Storm.

do: Give the Storm Blade to Petarus and Vanja → pick a rare weapon
Talk to Sin, then Petarus and Vanja again → take the BOTTLED STORM
Waypoint → The Vastiri Desert
Run to the sandstorm wall and use the Bottled Storm to dispel it
Enter The Oasis
Push to the Sand Pit and kill Shakari, Queen of the Sands
IF you want Jun / Betrayal flagged: talk to her in The Forbidden Vault sub-area
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Gauntlet fight: keep moving — dodge the stinger cones and don't stand in quicksand (stacking slow).

do: Turn in Queen of the Sands → BOOK OF SKILL (+1 passive, Irasha)
Waypoint → The Vastiri Desert, cross to the Foothills exit
Tag the waypoint
Find the dig site → kill Boulderback, take the CALENDAR OF FORTUNE
Take the side exit to The Boiling Lake
Kill The Basilisk and grab the BASILISK ACID — required for the main quest
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Two Sulphuric Fossilised Remains hide near the entrance corner — free fossils if you spot them.

do: Turn in Fastis Fortuna → BOOK OF REGRETS (2 respec points, Petarus and Vanja)
Waypoint → The Foothills, exit to The Tunnel
Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (blade sentries) — spawns left or right of the main path; second of three for Merciless Lab
Exit to The Quarry
Tag the waypoint
Enter the Shrine of the Winds arena (west or east edge): kill Kira, then Garukhan, Queen of the Winds
Take the SEKHEMA FEATHER from the arena
Find the entrance to The Refinery and go in
steps.tip: Kira dies fast; Garukhan is the real fight — stay mobile and clear the sand adds.

do: Fight through to General Adus and take the TRARTHAN POWDER
LOGOUT to town
Give the Sekhema Feather to Irasha (or Tasuni) → BOOK OF SKILL (+1 passive)
Hand Sin the Basilisk Acid + Trarthan Powder
Waypoint → The Quarry
Meet Sin at the blood pools by the Lesion (hand over Acid + Powder here if you still carry them) — he burns open the way
Enter The Belly of the Beast
Push through the gut corridors to The Rotting Core
Meet Sin at the Black Core
Clear the three wings in any order: Doedre, Darksoul / Maligaro, The Broken / Shavronne, Unbound
Enter The Black Heart, talk to Sin, then kill THE DEPRAVED TRINITY — stay out of the effluent pools
Talk to Lilly outside and set sail → Act 10
